mapper.insert: insert into jjc ( roleId , career , camp , score , time , records ) values ( #{ roleId , jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{ career , jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{ camp , jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{ score , jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{ time , jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{ records , jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
mapper.update: update jjc set career = #{ career , jdbcType=INTEGER}, camp = #{ camp , jdbcType=INTEGER}, score = #{ score , jdbcType=INTEGER}, records = #{ records , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, time = #{ time , jdbcType=VARCHAR} where roleId = #{ roleId , jdbcType=BIGINT}
